declarations.description: A generic button component with various style variants and states.
declarations.name: MyButton

members.name: variant
members.description: The visual style variant of the button.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When true, prevents user interaction and applies disabled styling.

members.name: loading
members.description: Displays a loading spinner and disables interaction.

events.name: my-click
events.description: Fired when the button is clicked and not disabled or loading.

events.name: my-focus
events.description: Fired when the button receives focus.

slots.description: Default slot for button label text.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Slot for an icon or element displayed before the label.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Slot for an icon or element displayed after the label.

cssParts.name: label
cssParts.description: The container wrapping the default slot content.

cssParts.name: spinner
cssParts.description: The loading spinner element, visible when loading is true.

cssProperties.name: --my-button-bg
cssProperties.description: Background color of the button in its default state.

cssProperties.name: --my-button-border-radius
cssProperties.description: Border radius applied to the button.

declarations.description: A flexible card component for displaying grouped content.
declarations.name: MyCard

members.name: heading
members.description: The card heading text rendered in the header region.

members.name: elevated
members.description: Applies an elevated shadow to visually lift the card.

members.name: scrollIntoView
members.description: Scrolls the card into the viewport.

events.name: my-card-expand
events.description: Fired when the card expand/collapse toggle is activated.

slots.description: Primary content area of the card.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Optional custom header content, overrides the heading attribute.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Footer content such as actions or metadata.

slots.name: media
slots.description: Media content (image, video) displayed above the card body.

cssParts.name: base
cssParts.description: The root wrapper element of the card.

cssParts.name: header
cssParts.description: The header region containing the heading slot.

cssProperties.name: --my-card-border
cssProperties.description: Border style applied to the card.

cssProperties.name: --my-card-padding
cssProperties.description: Internal padding for the card body.

declarations.description: A custom select/dropdown component with search and multi-select support.
declarations.name: MySelect

members.name: value
members.description: The currently selected value(s). An array when multiple is true.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text shown when no value is selected.

members.name: searchable
members.description: Adds an inline search input to filter options.

members.name: open
members.description: Controls the open/closed state of the dropdown panel.

events.name: my-change
events.description: Fired when the selected value changes.

events.name: my-show
events.description: Fired when the dropdown panel opens.

events.name: my-hide
events.description: Fired when the dropdown panel closes.

slots.description: Accepts <my-option> elements as the list of options.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Content displayed before the selected value label.

slots.name: clear-icon
slots.description: Custom icon for the clear button.

slots.name: expand-icon
slots.description: Custom icon for the expand/collapse indicator.

cssParts.name: trigger
cssParts.description: The clickable trigger element that toggles the dropdown.

cssParts.name: panel
cssParts.description: The dropdown panel containing the options list.

cssParts.name: search-input
cssParts.description: The search input inside the panel when searchable is true.

cssParts.name: tag
cssParts.description: Individual selection tags rendered in multiple mode.

cssProperties.name: --my-select-panel-max-height
cssProperties.description: Maximum height of the dropdown options panel.

cssProperties.name: --my-select-border-color
cssProperties.description: Border color of the trigger element.

cssProperties.name: --my-select-bg
cssProperties.description: Background color of the trigger and panel.
